allow: PowerShell(dotnet sln add src/AppBender.Web src/AppBender.Core tests/AppBender.Tests; dotnet add src/AppBender.Web reference src/AppBender.Core; dotnet add tests/AppBender.Tests reference src/AppBender.Core)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5210/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; break } catch {} } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { "HOME: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "HOME: no response" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(45\); $r = $null; do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5210/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 } catch {} } while \(-not $r -and \(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { "HOME: $\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } else { "HOME: no response" })
